title: Add session cancel/discard option to ox agent session
description: Currently ox agent session stop is the only way to end a recording, and it always processes and uploads. There's no way to cancel/discard a session (e.g., throwaway exploration, accidental start, or a session that went sideways). Add a cancel/discard mechanism - either a separate command (ox agent session cancel) or a flag on stop (ox agent session stop --discard). Should clean up the recording state file without processing or uploading.

title: Early write-access check on session start for public repo viewers
description: When a non-member tries to record a session on a public repo, session start succeeds but session stop fails with a confusing timeout during LFS upload. Add checkUploadAccess() call during runAgentSessionStart() to detect read-only access upfront and refuse to record with a clear error message.

title: Add tests for session start read-only access check
description: Add tests verifying: (1) checkUploadAccess returning ErrReadOnly → session start returns error with clear message, (2) checkUploadAccess returning nil → session start proceeds normally, (3) checkUploadAccess returning other errors → session start proceeds (fail-open). Follow existing test patterns in cmd/ox/agent_session_test.go.

title: Remove deprecated non-endpoint-aware checkout functions
description:
Remove 5 deprecated checkout functions from internal/gitserver/checkout.go that have zero production callers. Only test callers and stale comments reference them.

Functions to remove:
- CheckoutLedgerWithURL (0 prod callers, 4 tests)
- CheckoutTeamContextWithURL (0 prod callers, 3 tests)
- CheckoutTeamLedger (0 prod callers, 3 tests)
- CheckoutRepo (0 prod callers, 1 test)
- CloneFromURL (0 prod callers, 2 tests)

Also:
- Remove 13 associated tests in checkout_test.go
- Update stale comments in doctor_git_repos.go:1335 and daemon/sync.go:1238 that reference CloneFromURL (code already uses CloneFromURLWithEndpoint)
- Consider whether LoadCredentials() can be made unexported after these are gone (remaining callers: CloneFromURLWithEndpoint fallback, CheckCredentialStatus, LoadCredentialsForEndpoint fallback)
close_reason: Removed all 5 deprecated checkout functions, 12 associated tests, updated 2 stale comments

title: Add per-step timing instrumentation to ox agent prime
description: ox agent prime has no latency metrics. When it runs slow (e.g., 25s observed), there's no way to diagnose which step was slow. Add slog.Debug timing for each phase of runAgentPrime (daemon health check, session marker reads, auth check, instance store ops, session recording, team context discovery, guidance load, daemon attachment). Include total elapsed time in JSON output. Friction telemetry captures errors but not latency - this fills that gap.

title: Add checkUploadAccess call in runAgentSessionStart
description: In cmd/ox/agent_session.go, insert checkUploadAccess(projectRoot) call after the auth check (line 74) and before the terms notice (line 77). If errors.Is(err, api.ErrReadOnly), return a clear error: 'you have read-only access to this repo — sessions cannot be uploaded to the ledger'. This is fail-open by design: checkUploadAccess returns nil on network errors, missing auth, or API failures. Only explicit ErrReadOnly blocks recording. Reference: checkUploadAccess already exists in cmd/ox/session_upload.go lines 23-55.
